Home › MCP Servers › mcp-sqlite

mcp-sqlite

Free
databasesqlitelocal +1

Direct SQLite database MCP with full SQL query, insert, update support. Lightweight with no separate DB server needed.

Use Cases

  • Local data storage
  • Rapid prototyping
  • Analytics
